rules.title: Missing Post-Mortem Report Reference
rules.description: Murder chargesheets must reference the post-mortem examination report

remediation.summary: Include post-mortem report in evidence schedule
steps: Reference PM report with doctor name and date

rules.title: Missing Inquest Reference
rules.description: Murder cases require inquest proceedings under CrPC 174/BNSS 194

steps: State date and place of inquest
Reference the magistrate notification if applicable

rules.title: Missing Weapon Recovery Reference
rules.description: If weapon used, chargesheet should reference weapon recovery and FSL report

remediation.summary: Document weapon recovery and forensic analysis
steps: Include FSL report reference for weapon analysis
Document chain of custody for the weapon
